title: Reliquary
description: Vanilla-plus style datapack that adds a plethora of structures, biomes, items, and features with an emphasis on lore and environmental ambience.
body:
Vanilla-plus style datapack that adds a plethora of structures, biomes, items, and features with an emphasis on lore and environmental ambience.

Includes so far:
- Redwood forest
- Ancient jungle w/ ruins
- New forests and other variations of biomes
